do local B=math.floor local g=table.concat local Z=string.sub local V=type local U=table.insert local T=d local X=string.char local return(function(d,Z,V,U,T,X,Y,o,c,I,F,N,M,p,L,r,C,l,y,g,A,h,P,q)r,M,C,I,L,N,A,q,l,P,o,y,g,h,c,F,p=function(d,B)local Z=I(B)local V=function(V,U,T,X,Y,o)return g(d,{V,U;T;X,Y;o},B,Z)end return V end,function(d,B)local Z=I(B)local V=function(V,U,T,X,Y,o,q)return g(d,{V;U,T;X,Y;o;q},B,Z)end return V end,function()N=N+(-150385-(-150386))q[N]=459595+-459594 return N end,function(d)for V=function(V,U,T,X,Y)return g(d,{V;U;T,X;Y},B,Z)end return V end,function(d)local B,g=-694251-(-694252),d[755433+-755432]while g do q[g],B=q[g]-(586114+-586113),B+(29783-29782)if q[g]==-174096+174096
